case inr.refine_2
G : Type u
inst✝³ : AddCommGroup G
inst✝² : Fintype G
ε : ℝ
q : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Module (ZMod q) G
A₁ A₂ S : Finset G
α : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
hq₃ : 3 ≤ q
hq : Nat.Prime q
hα₀ : 0 < α
hα₂ : α ≤ 2⁻¹
hε₀ : 0 < ε
hε₁ : ε ≤ 1
hαA₁ : α ≤ ↑A₁.dens
hαA₂ : α ≤ ↑A₂.dens
x✝ : MeasurableSpace G := ⊤
this✝⁴ : Fact (1 < q)
this✝³ : DiscreteMeasurableSpace G
hA₁✝ : A₁.Nonempty
hA₂ : A₂.Nonempty
hα₁ : α ≤ 1
this✝² : 0 ≤ log α⁻¹
this✝¹ : 0 ≤ log (ε * α)⁻¹
hS : S.Nonempty
hA₁ : ↑(A₁.addConst univ) ≤ α⁻¹
k : ℕ := ⌈1 + log (ε * α / 4)⁻¹⌉₊
hk₀ : 0 < k
T : Finset G
hTcard : α⁻¹ ^ (-4096 * ↑⌈1 + log (min 1 (↑A₂.card / ↑S.card))⁻¹⌉ * ↑k ^ 2 / ε ^ 2) * ↑univ.card ≤ ↑T.card
hTε : ↑‖mu T ∗^ k ∗ (mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂) - mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂‖_[⊤] ≤ ε
hT : T.Nonempty
Δ : Finset (AddChar G ℂ) := largeSpec (mu T) 2⁻¹
V : Submodule (ZMod q) G := (AddSubgroup.toZModSubmodule q) (⨅ γ ∈ Δ, γ.toAddMonoidHom.ker)
V' : Finset G := (↑V).toFinset
this✝ : ∑ x ∈ S, (mu V' ∗ mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x = V'.expect fun x => (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x
this : ∑ x ∈ S, (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x = (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0
⊢ |∑ x ∈ S, (mu (↑V).toFinset ∗ mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x| ≤ ε

    simp only [k, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc]
    gcongr
    exact hε₁

    let f := mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂
    have h_symm : mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂ ○ 𝟭 S = conjneg f := by
      ext; simp [f, dconv_eq_conv_conjneg, conjneg_eq_check_of_isReal, check, conv_assoc, conv_comm]
    rw [h_symm]
    have : ‖mu V' ∗ conjneg f - conjneg f‖_[∞] = ‖mu V' ∗ f - f‖_[∞] := by
      simp_rw [← conv_conjneg, conjneg_mu, conjneg_sub, dLpNorm_conjneg]
    refine (MeasureTheory.norm_le_dLpNorm_top _ _).trans (this.trans_le ?_)
    refine (AlmostPeriodicity.linfty_spec_approx (by positivity) hTε (by positivity) hk₀).trans ?_
    calc
      ε + 4 * (2⁻¹ : ℝ) ^ k * ‖f‖_[1]
        ≤ ε + 4 * (2⁻¹ : ℝ) ^ k * 1 := by gcongr; exact dL1Norm_dconv_le
      _ ≤ ε + 4 * (2⁻¹ : ℝ) ^ k := by simp

        simp only [k, Nat.ceil_le, one_div, mul_inv_rev, inv_inv] at hk₀ ⊢
